item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p09","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer explicitly refuses the requested new gift-processing counter as the default, identifies the repeated downstream queue-splitting pattern across exchange, points redemption, preorder pickup, and gift pickup, and moves the fix upstream to unified intake triage and real-time capacity scheduling. It does not provide any implementation step, copy, field, or command that would create the requested new channel."}
